plugins.name: sniff
plugins.description: AI-powered QA testing. Scan source code, check accessibility, visual regression, and performance. Auto-detects your dev server.

plugins.name: ui-ux-suite
plugins.description: Design audit tool. Scores projects across 12 dimensions (color, typography, a11y, layout) grounded in 24 named UX laws with primary-source citations. WCAG, APCA, OKLCH color science. Zero dependencies.
